subject: [PATCH v3 01/10] nfsd: fix cpntf publish race in nfs4_init_cp_state

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch fixes a race condition in the nfsd kernel module by ensuring that the creation and linking of a new cpntf entry is done under the same lock, preventing concurrent access to an uninitialized list head. The fix involves folding the cs_type assignment and list_add operations into the same critical section as idr_alloc_cyclic, and switching _free_cpntf_state_locked to use list_del_init instead of list_del. This preserves NFS4_COPY_STID semantics by skipping the list_add operation when p_stid is NULL.
